scripts._dev:concurrent: concurrently -n watch,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "yarn watch:shared" "yarn workspace @openvaa/frontend dev"
scripts.db:start: yarn build && yarn supabase:start && yarn workspace @openvaa/frontend dev
scripts.db:reset-with-data: yarn supabase:reset && yarn db:seed --template default && yarn dev:clean
scripts.dev:start: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:start is now yarn db:start; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:start
scripts.dev:down: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:down is now yarn db:down; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:down
scripts.dev:stop: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:stop is now yarn db:stop; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:stop
scripts.dev:reset: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:reset is now yarn db:reset; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:reset
scripts.dev:reset-with-data: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:reset-with-data is now yarn db:reset-with-data; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:reset-with-data
scripts.dev:seed: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:seed is now yarn db:seed; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:seed
scripts.dev:seed:teardown: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:seed:teardown is now yarn db:seed:teardown; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:seed:teardown
scripts.dev:status: echo '[deprecated] yarn dev:status is now yarn db:status; alias will be removed after v2.10' >&2 && yarn db:status
scripts.format: turbo run build --filter=@openvaa/app-shared... && prettier --write . && yarn workspace @openvaa/docs format
scripts.format:check: turbo run build --filter=@openvaa/app-shared... && prettier --check . && yarn workspace @openvaa/docs format:check
scripts.lint:fix: turbo run lint -- --fix && eslint --flag v10_config_lookup_from_file --fix tests
scripts.lint:check: turbo run lint && eslint --flag v10_config_lookup_from_file tests
scripts.docs:prepare: turbo run build --filter='./packages/*' && yarn workspace @openvaa/frontend prepare
